zh.title: 以太坊/美元技术分析：震荡偏弱整理
zh.content:
当前以太坊价格围绕2020一线窄幅震荡，整体运行于20日均线2056下方，短期结构偏弱，反弹动能不足，市场情绪偏谨慎略弱。

MACD指标维持负值区间，空头动能仍占主导，但柱状缩短显示下行动能减弱。RSI缺失但结合价格结构看，整体仍处于弱势整理阶段延续。

下方关键支撑位在2016附近及2010整数关口，一旦跌破或将测试2000心理位。上方阻力集中于2056均线及2080区域承压。

短期建议以区间震荡思路对待，未有效突破2056前不宜追多，反弹至阻力区可分批减仓，严格控制止损保持观望等待方向选择信号。。

en.title: Ethereum vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
Ethereum is trading near 2020, remaining under noticeable short-term pressure after failing to reclaim the 2050–2060 region. Price action continues to reflect a weak bearish structure, with ETH trading below the 20-day simple moving average at 2056.66. This positioning suggests sellers still control momentum in the near term. The narrow daily range between 2016 and 2024 also indicates reduced volatility, often a precursor to a stronger directional move once liquidity expands.

The MACD reading at -15.91 reinforces the current downside bias, signaling fading bullish momentum and continued bearish divergence in recent sessions. Although the RSI value is unavailable, overall market structure implies neutral-to-weak sentiment rather than oversold exhaustion. If Ethereum remains below the SMA(20), traders may continue treating rallies as temporary corrective rebounds rather than the start of a sustainable recovery phase.

Immediate support is forming around 2015–2000, a psychologically important zone that could attract short-term buyers. A confirmed break below 2000 may expose ETH to deeper downside toward 1980 and potentially 1950. On the upside, resistance remains clustered near 2035 and more significantly around 2055–2060, where the moving average currently caps bullish attempts. A breakout above that region would improve sentiment and could open a path toward 2100.

Short-term traders may prefer a cautious approach until clearer momentum confirmation develops. Bearish setups remain favorable while price stays below the 20-day average, particularly on failed rebounds into resistance. However, aggressive downside positioning near 2000 carries elevated reversal risk because of strong historical demand in that area. Conservative traders may wait for either a decisive break under support or a sustained recovery above 2060 before increasing exposure.
